name: codex-app-web
description: Independent, open-source web control center compatible with Codex app-server workflows

scripts.ci: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm repo:hygiene:check && pnpm quality:dead-code && pnpm protocol:manifest:check && pnpm protocol:drift:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build && pnpm quality:size && pnpm security:scan && pnpm release:dry-run
scripts.start: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=production PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 node server.cjs
scripts.start:reuse: cross-env NODE_ENV=production PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 CODEX_REUSE_EXISTING=1 UI_COMMAND="node server.cjs" node start-all.cjs
scripts.dev: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ALLOW_NEXT_DEV_FALLBACK=1 PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 UI_COMMAND="node server.cjs" node start-all.cjs
scripts.dev:reuse: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ALLOW_NEXT_DEV_FALLBACK=1 PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 CODEX_REUSE_EXISTING=1 UI_COMMAND="node server.cjs" node start-all.cjs
scripts.dev:lan: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development ALLOW_NEXT_DEV_FALLBACK=1 DEV_LAN_ACCESS=1 UI_HOST=0.0.0.0 PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 SHOW_LAN_URLS=1 UI_COMMAND="node server.cjs" node start-all.cjs
scripts.dev:ui: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development PORT=1989 PORT_FALLBACK=1990 node server.cjs
scripts.smoke: node scripts/sync-public-vendor-assets.mjs && cross-env BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:1989 node scripts/smoke-control-center.mjs
